items.title: S01E01 - An Instinct for Murder
items.summary: With a body in the river and a series of spacesuit failures, Spring is unconvinced by the machine's verdict of accidental death. And instinct is telling him to pursue it even if it means laying his own life on the line.

infolabels.title: An Instinct for Murder
infolabels.plot: With a body in the river and a series of spacesuit failures, Spring is unconvinced by the machine's verdict of accidental death. And instinct is telling him to pursue it even if it means laying his own life on the line.

items.title: S01E02 - Conversations With the Dead
items.summary: ""Lee Jones has been dealt with. You are next.""

infolabels.title: Conversations With the Dead
infolabels.plot: ""Lee Jones has been dealt with. You are next.""

items.title: S01E03 - Intelligent Listening for Beginners
items.summary: There has been an explosion at the chemical plant, disaster in the Channel Tunnel and now there's a terrorist threat. The only clue is a couple of lines of obscure poetry. Can Spring and Theroux unravel the secret in time?

infolabels.title: Intelligent Listening for Beginners
infolabels.plot: There has been an explosion at the chemical plant, disaster in the Channel Tunnel and now there's a terrorist threat. The only clue is a couple of lines of obscure poetry. Can Spring and Theroux unravel the secret in time?

items.title: S01E04 - Trivial Games and Paranoid Pursuits
items.summary: Microbiologist Harvey Goodman has disappeared. It seems that the American space station RONALD REAGAN holds the answer, but pool-playing Commander Griffin is proving less than helpful. Diving deeper into a web of international double-dealing, Nathan smells a rat.

infolabels.title: Trivial Games and Paranoid Pursuits
infolabels.plot: Microbiologist Harvey Goodman has disappeared. It seems that the American space station RONALD REAGAN holds the answer, but pool-playing Commander Griffin is proving less than helpful. Diving deeper into a web of international double-dealing, Nathan smells a rat.

items.title: S01E05 - This Case to Be Opened In a Million Years
items.summary: Exactly what happened to make a nuclear waste dumper launch abort? Is the Mafia alive and kicking in 2027? Will Nathan manage to survive being charged with murder?

infolabels.title: This Case to Be Opened In a Million Years
infolabels.plot: Exactly what happened to make a nuclear waste dumper launch abort? Is the Mafia alive and kicking in 2027? Will Nathan manage to survive being charged with murder?

items.title: S01E07 - A Double Life
items.summary: When a mystery kidnapper steals three frozen embryos from Moonbase, the crime seems motiveless. Then their mother turns out to be the wife of an infamous arms dealer with a list of henchmen and enemies a mile long.

infolabels.title: A Double Life
infolabels.plot: When a mystery kidnapper steals three frozen embryos from Moonbase, the crime seems motiveless. Then their mother turns out to be the wife of an infamous arms dealer with a list of henchmen and enemies a mile long.

items.title: S01E08 - Other People's Secrets
items.summary: The stress of deep space seems to be taking its toll at last with the onset of more and more maintenance errors. The trouble is, they've co-incided with the arrival of the safety controller and a visiting psychiatrist! As the chaos escalates, the safety of the entire moonbase is at stake.

infolabels.title: Other People's Secrets
infolabels.plot: The stress of deep space seems to be taking its toll at last with the onset of more and more maintenance errors. The trouble is, they've co-incided with the arrival of the safety controller and a visiting psychiatrist! As the chaos escalates, the safety of the entire moonbase is at stake.

items.title: S01E09 - Little Green Men and Other Martians
items.summary: Can a martian really have been unearthed at last? With a freighter carrying the new discovery bound for Moonbase, it certainly seems that way. Suddenly the Star Cops find themselves caught up in a race for the scoop of the millennium. But the cost is high, and the body count is rising...
